expectations.text: filter-all-unread: all/unread 두 가지 필터 상태 전환이 코드에 구현되어 있다
expectations.evidence: without_skill NotificationList.tsx has FilterMode type ('all' | 'unread'), useState<FilterMode>('all'), and two filter buttons. Filtering logic present on line 54-57.

expectations.text: hook-extracted: 필터 로직이 별도 커스텀 훅 파일로 분리되어 있다
expectations.evidence: Filter logic is inline in NotificationList.tsx. No separate hook file exists in the without_skill outputs directory for notification filtering.

expectations.text: hook-name-pattern: 훅 이름이 use{Verb}{Resource} 패턴을 따른다
expectations.evidence: No custom hook was extracted for notification filtering, so there is no hook name to evaluate.

expectations.text: empty-state-rendered: unread 필터 결과 0건 시 data-testid='notifications-empty' 요소가 렌더링된다
expectations.evidence:
without_skill NotificationList.tsx line 86-92: filtered.length === 0 renders

.

expectations.text: error-over-filter: error 상태일 때 필터 결과 대신 data-testid='notifications-error' 요소가 우선 렌더링된다
expectations.evidence: without_skill NotificationList.tsx lines 46-52: error check returns early with data-testid='notifications-error', before filter buttons.

expectations.text: handler-prefix: 이벤트 핸들러 함수명이 handle 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: Filter button onClick handlers use inline arrow functions: onClick={() => setFilter('all')}. No named handler functions with handle prefix.

expectations.text: e2e-spec-path: E2E spec 파일이 features/next-app/tests/ 하위에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: E2E spec exists at without_skill/outputs/tests/dashboard-notification-filter.spec.ts, and the summary states it was copied to features/next-app/tests/dashboard-notification-filter.spec.ts.

expectations.text: no-fetch-in-component: NotificationList 컴포넌트 파일에 직접적인 fetch/axios 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: without_skill NotificationList.tsx line 21 has a direct fetch('/api/notifications') call inside useEffect.
